title: Convert a domain event into an outbound DTO
scenario: Outbound adapters also need explicit boundaries. A domain event can become a transport DTO through an infallible From implementation.
instructions: Implement From<UserRegistered> for UserRegisteredDto. Convert user_id to String and move the email.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps from-dto-outbound explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
